scorecards.name: Groundedness
scorecards.description: Fraction of factual claims supported by retrieved citations.

scorecards.name: Harm
scorecards.description: Responses flagged for hateful, violent, sexual or self-harm content.

scorecards.name: PHI leak
scorecards.description: Responses containing protected health information not authorised for the channel.
scorecards.note: Three incidents this week traced to a new EOB template the redaction rules did not cover. Mitigation: template added to the redaction allow-list and scheduled retraining.

scorecards.name: Citation coverage
scorecards.description: Fraction of benefits answers with at least one valid citation.

scorecards.name: Human handoff rate
scorecards.description: Fraction of conversations that escalate to a human agent.

incidents.summary: EOB explanation showed full member ID instead of last-4 in 3 sessions.
